monitoring.text1:
We monitor the services 
of your systems
monitoring.text2: Nextron7 is a tool that allows you to monitor your IT infrastructure, including servers, network devices, applications, and services, to ensure proper operation and availability.
monitoring.text4: We monitor a variety of network services such as SMTP, POP3, HTTP, SMTP, and many others, so you can monitor and receive alerts when problems are detected.
monitoring.text6: We monitor hardware resources such as processor load, disk usage, memory, and port status.
monitoring.text8: Continuous monitoring for potential security threats, such as intrusions, malware, vulnerabilities, and suspicious network activity.
monitoring.text10: Monitoring the status and success of backups. Includes backup failure detection and alert generation.
monitoring.text12: Monitoring the performance and availability of business-critical applications. This includes detecting outages, slowness, or errors in web applications, databases, email servers, etc.
monitoring.text14: Monitoring database performance and resource usage. Includes detection of slow queries, deadlocks, crashes, and connectivity issues.
monitoring.text17: We determine what you want to monitor and what your specific objectives are.
monitoring.text19: We select sensors compatible with the conditions and parameters you need to monitor.
monitoring.text21: We identify whether the sensor is remote or within a server to configure it and obtain accurate data.
monitoring.text22: We test and validate the sensors
monitoring.text23: We verify that the sensors are working properly and that the data collected is accurate and useful.
monitoring.text24: We guarantee the availability and stability of your services
monitoring.text26: Our tool can check website and service availability at regular intervals and quickly detect outages.
monitoring.text28: Set up automatic alerts that are triggered when a fall is detected via email or phone calls.
monitoring.text30: We customize notifications to include relevant information, such as a description of the issue, estimated impact, and next steps.
monitoring.text32: We provide regular reports to our customers on system uptime and outages.
monitoring.text34: We have implemented an escalation system to ensure alerts are addressed quickly.
monitoring.text36: We conduct periodic tests to ensure the alert system is functioning properly, simulating crashes and verifying that the alerts are activated correctly.
monitoring.text38: We inform you about any planned maintenance that may affect service availability and provide regular updates during outages.

wp.text1: Are you experiencing these issues with your WordPress?
wp.text2: We offer comprehensive solutions to ensure your CMS runs smoothly while you focus on your business.
wp.text4: Do you have outdated WordPress core, plugins, or themes? This exposes your site to critical security vulnerabilities.
wp.text6: Is your site loading slowly? Visitors abandon sites that take more than 3 seconds to load, impacting your SEO and conversions.
wp.text8: Do you have outdated WordPress core, plugins, or themes? This exposes your site to critical security vulnerabilities.
wp.text10: Is your site crashing at critical moments? Incompatible updates can cause your site to suddenly stop working.
wp.text12: Don't have recent backups? Without daily backups, you could lose all your content in the event of a failure.
wp.text14: Don't have time to maintain your site? WordPress maintenance requires constant attention that you may not be able to afford.
wp.text15: More than just updates, we offer peace of mind and
wp.text17: We keep your entire WordPress ecosystem up to date
wp.text20: We speed up your WordPress site
wp.text23: How we transform your WordPress experience
wp.text25: What's included: We don't just update everything (WordPress core, plugins, themes), but we do so with a secure protocol: first in a testing environment for compatibility and to prevent your site from going down. Then, we deploy it live.
wp.text26: Value: We take the stress out of an update breaking your site. We test first.
wp.text28: What's included: We don't just update everything (WordPress core, plugins, themes), but we do so with a secure protocol: first in a testing environment for compatibility and to prevent your site from going down. Then, we deploy live.
wp.text29: Value: We take the stress out of an update breaking your site. We test first.
wp.text31: What's included: Database cleanup and optimization, advanced caching setup, image optimization, and CDN (Content Delivery Network).
wp.text32: Value: We improved the user experience, increased conversions, and improved Google ranking.
wp.text34: What's included: Automated daily backups stored in secure, remote locations (like Amazon S3 or Google Cloud). Fast, free one-click restore.
wp.text35: Value: Your work is always safe. We can recover your site in minutes, not days.
wp.text37: What's included: Systems that check your site every 5 minutes. If it goes down, we receive an immediate alert and act to resolve it as quickly as possible.
wp.text38: Value: Your site will always be online. We'll alert you before you or your customers notice a problem.
wp.text40: What's included: A direct communication channel (email, chat, ticket) to resolve any incidents, errors, or technical questions that may arise.
wp.text41: Value: You'll have a team of WordPress experts at your disposal, with no extra costs for development hours.
wp.text43: Ideal for freelancers, bloggers and small businesses
wp.text44: Perfect if you have a single website that's important to your business, but isn't a complex or high-traffic e-commerce platform.
wp.text46: Ideal for e-commerce, corporate and high-traffic sites
wp.text47: Designed for websites that are critical to a company's operations and revenue. Essential for online stores, membership sites, news portals, and any website that can't afford to let things go wrong.
wp.text49: Not sure? Let's talk. Tell us about your project, and we'll recommend the plan that best suits your needs and budget.
